problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
